about.name: Mukesh Das
about.title: AI/ML Engineer
about.bio: AI/ML engineer focused on building intelligent systems powered by Large Language Models. I design and develop AI-driven applications using Python, PyTorch, and FastAPI, with a strong focus on automation, LLM reasoning pipelines, and scalable backend architectures. My work includes building autonomous AI agents, LLM-powered test case generation systems, and document intelligence platforms. I enjoy exploring how AI can automate complex workflows and create practical tools that solve real-world engineering problems.

projects.title: Autonomous AI Agent for UI Test Automation
projects.description: Developed an autonomous AI agent capable of converting natural language testing instructions into executable UI automation workflows. The system uses a custom LLM reasoning pipeline to understand testing objectives, plan actions, and execute browser automation through Playwright.

projects.title: Custom LLM from Scratch
projects.description: Building a transformer-based language model from first principles using PyTorch including custom tokenizer, multi-head attention, positional encoding, and training pipeline to deeply understand LLM internals.

projects.title: LLM-Powered Intelligent Test Case Generation System
projects.description: Built an AI-driven system that automatically generates comprehensive test cases from UI descriptions and product requirements. Uses prompt engineering pipelines to generate positive, negative, and edge-case scenarios for software testing.

projects.title: AI-Powered PDF Question Answering System
projects.description: Developed an AI system that allows users to upload PDF documents and ask questions about the content using natural language. The system extracts document text and uses LLM reasoning to provide contextual answers.

projects.title: AI Portfolio (This Site)
projects.description: Fully animated developer portfolio powered by FastAPI backend, Three.js particle effects, GSAP scroll animations, and dynamic data served through API endpoints.

projects.title: LLM Prompt Playground API
projects.description: Simple API for experimenting with LLM prompts and responses. Users can adjust parameters such as temperature and token limits while generating responses through a FastAPI backend.

timeline.title: Autonomous AI Agent for UI Test Automation
timeline.desc: Developed an autonomous AI agent that converts natural language testing instructions into executable UI automation workflows using a custom LLM reasoning pipeline and Playwright.

timeline.title: LLM-Powered Intelligent Test Case Generation System
timeline.desc: Built an AI-driven system that generates structured software test cases from UI descriptions and product requirements with exportable JSON and CSV reports.

timeline.title: AI-Powered PDF Question Answering System
timeline.desc: Developed a document intelligence system allowing users to upload PDFs and query their contents using natural language.

timeline.title: FastAPI × LLM Backend Platform
timeline.desc: Architected a scalable backend system using FastAPI to deploy LLM-powered applications with modular API architecture.

timeline.title: Started B.E. Computer Engineering (AI & ML)
timeline.desc: Began undergraduate engineering studies focusing on programming fundamentals, data structures, and algorithms.

timeline.title: Started Learning AI & Deep Learning
timeline.desc: Started exploring machine learning, deep learning, and transformer architectures using PyTorch.
